"magic"."print_parts"."print_part_updations", true as "in_database", jsonb_build_object() as "original" from "magic"."cards" inner join "magic"."card_localizations" on "magic"."card_localizations"."card_id" = "magic"."cards"."card_id" inner join "magic"."card_parts" on "magic"."card_parts"."card_id" = "magic"."cards"."card_id" inner join "magic"."card_part_localizations" on ("magic"."card_part_localizations"."card_id" = "magic"."card_parts"."card_id" and "magic"."card_part_localizations"."locale" = "magic"."card_localizations"."locale" and "magic"."card_part_localizations"."part_index" = "magic"."card_parts"."part_index") inner join "magic"."prints" on ("magic"."cards"."card_id" = "magic"."prints"."card_id" and "magic"."prints"."lang" = (
                CASE
                    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "magic"."prints" WHERE card_id = "magic"."cards"."card_id" AND lang = "magic"."card_localizations"."locale")
                    THEN "magic"."card_localizations"."locale"
                    ELSE 'en'
                END
            )) inner join "magic"."print_parts" on ("magic"."cards"."card_id" = "magic"."print_parts"."card_id" and "magic"."prints"."set" = "magic"."print_parts"."set" and "magic"."prints"."number" = "magic"."print_parts"."number" and "magic"."prints"."lang" = "magic"."print_parts"."lang" and "magic"."card_parts"."part_index" = "magic"."print_parts"."part_index")
